parsed.generic_mechanism: A cumulative argument depends on preserving setup, development, and payoff; reversed or spliced units sever those dependencies, so even individually clear sentences cannot create sustained momentum.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete domestic, social, and sensory examples build a coherent progression from learned preference through compulsive behavior to the proposed change, though repeated promises and emphatic refrains make the final stretch feel overextended.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Recognizable examples and intact sentences survive, but conclusions precede premises, questions lose their answers, headings arrive after their material, and the chapter terminates on introductory contents rather than a developed landing.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Recognizable examples and intact sentences survive, but conclusions precede premises, questions lose their answers, headings arrive after their material, and the chapter terminates on introductory contents rather than a developed landing.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: Concrete domestic, social, and sensory examples build a coherent progression from learned preference through compulsive behavior to the proposed change, though repeated promises and emphatic refrains make the final stretch feel overextended.
